name: jsmap
comment: acorn is vendored into vendor/, not shipped in node_modules. Run `npm run vendor` to refresh.

scripts.vendor: npm install && cp node_modules/acorn/dist/acorn.mjs vendor/acorn.mjs && cp node_modules/acorn-walk/dist/walk.mjs vendor/walk.mjs && sed 's/from "acorn"/from ".\/acorn.mjs"/g' node_modules/@sveltejs/acorn-typescript/index.js > vendor/acorn-typescript.mjs
